title: The Hive
description: A Kitchen sink pack made with the sole purpose of being fun. Without giving you any constraints in what to do
body:
# The Hive
It is a kitchen sink pack with a host of magic, fighting and tech mods.
There is something for everyone, go at your own pace, have fun.

### **Create your own adventure:** 
- **RPG Elements** - Become an Archer, wizard, Rogue or Paladin with the RPG Series
- **Fight** - fight monsters and players alike with more swords, staffs and axes than you can imagine
- **Explore** - search or massive dungeons, sprawling villages or flying structures
- **Dimensions** - The Nether and are totally overhauled and try to find the origins of the Bees
- **Sprawling Factories** - Make massive factories with mods like create and Modern Industrialization
- **Epic Battles** - Have epic battles with your friends with Cobblemon
- **Be a Builder** - Make massive mansions or cozy houses with enough decoration for a lifetime
- **Be a farmer** - Create your own farm, bakery, vineyard or restaurant
- **Trade** - Create shops to sell your own specialized goods or trade with villagers
